title: Waktu Henti di Ruang Tunggu
theme: Menjelajahi beban emosional dari janji yang belum terpenuhi dan kata-kata yang tak terucap antara anak dan orang tua di tengah ketidakpastian masa depan.

cover.prompt: A quiet clinic waiting room. A row of clean, blue plastic chairs, some empty, stretching into the background. Two indistinct, seated figures occupy the middle ground, presented as subtle silhouettes against a minimalist, light-toned wall. The scene is permeated by a profound sense of stillness, evoking unspoken reflection and a quiet weight. Cinematic composition, soft ambient lighting, gentle depth of field focusing on the foreground chairs.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, soft diffused lighting, gentle color grading

meta.plan_summary: A poignant family drama about Maya and her elderly mother, Bu Rahma, in a clinic waiting room after a difficult consultation. The story explores their strained relationship, unspoken words, and unfulfilled promises amidst medical uncertainty. A brief, almost imperceptible touch or glance serves as a silent understanding and a fragile beginning towards reconciliation.
